productDisplayName: Wrangler Men N0. 3 Applique Polo Navy Blue T-Shirts
description: CompositionNavy blue polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed and tipped collar that has a yellow and white lining, fabric tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with ribbed hems and red lining, has a vented hem with red tape inseam at the slits and red lining along the hem, and appliquéd collection number on left chest with appliquéd branding on right chest FittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryDesigned for the man of regal style, this polo t-shirt from wrangler is made of pure cotton to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. The ribbed sleeve hems sit snugly around your well-toned arms, while the vented hem provides a comfortable Fit. Team this tee with denims and sandals from the wide range available at myntra for those semi-formal and casual events.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
